Lumen5

Turn blog posts and articles into engaging videos

6/10Overall Rating
9/10Ease of Use
$19/moStarting Price
2017Founded
Free Plan Available

About Lumen5

Lumen5 is a ai video platform founded in 2017. It positions itself as “Turn blog posts and articles into engaging videos” and is best suited for content marketers, repurposing blog content to video. Pricing starts at $19/mo, and a free plan is available.

Features

FeatureAvailable
Text To VideoYes
Image To VideoNo
Avatar Talking HeadNo
Screen RecordingNo
Auto CaptionsYes
TemplatesYes
Stock FootageYes
Voice OverYes
Api AccessNo
Batch ProcessingNo

Pros & Cons

Pros

  • Blog-to-video automation
  • Large media library
  • Brand kit support
  • Easy drag-and-drop

Cons

  • Videos look template-heavy
  • No AI generation
  • Watermark on free plan
  • Limited customization
